title: ADULT RESIDENTIAL ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: NARA NW RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CENTER ADULT RESIDENTIAL ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Residential treatment center providing a range of services to support individuals in recovery from substance abuse. Treatment model is based on the Medicine Wheel, integrating health (wellness), mental health, sobriety, and culture. Children up to age 5 can stay with the client. 17645 NW St Helens Highway Portland, OR 97231 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Treatment Center: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 621-1069 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 621-1069 FAX (503) 621-0116 Admissions [email protected] FAX (503) 621-0200 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $185 per day for adults. $95 per day for children staying with parents. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, VA, Blue Cross, Indian Health Services, Tribal Funds, and private pay. DOCUMENTS: Must have a current alcohol and drug assessment, physical exam, and tuberculosis test prior to being reviewed and approved by the admissions committee AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
